_comment: Dien cac gia tri duoi day cho DUNG MAY BAN dang dung, roi luu lai — khong sua code hay SKILL.md.
_edit_video_root_note: Duong dan toi thu muc goc chua cac folder buoi quay (source, workspace, video final). Vi du: 'D:\\Video\\Edit video' hoac 'C:\\Users\\ten-ban\\Videos\\Edit video'.
_ffmpeg_path_note: De trong = tu tim ffmpeg tren PATH he thong (cach chuan, hau het may khong can dien gi o day). Chi dien duong dan .exe day du vao day neu shell bao 'khong tim thay ffmpeg' VA khong muon them ffmpeg vao PATH.
